went_well: Live-site SyntaxError root-caused to literal hashline markers in committed app.js:656/index.html:20 within minutes via deployed-bundle curl + node --check
Storyboard 404s fixed by moving images inside the Pages allowlist with 800px JPEG re-encode (13.5MB PNG → 600KB)
went_wrong: Main session initially misdiagnosed the markers as read-tool display artifacts because local node --check passed while file was mid-edit by a concurrent session
CI's node --check gate was bypassed because the branch moved between check and deploy

improvement_actions.action: Verify claims against the deployed bundle (curl + node --check), never only the mutable working tree, when diagnosing live incidents
improvement_actions.evidence_when_applied: tmp/deployed-app.mjs check in this session transcript

improvement_actions.action: Add a pre-push grep for non-ASCII edit markers (≔) across allowlisted files
